name: 3D Engine
desc: Interactive 3D wireframe engine built with vanilla JavaScript and HTML5 Canvas. Features real-time rotation, projection, and custom geometry editing.

name: MTP
desc: Master thesis project on autonomous drone navigation and mapping using onboard sensors and real-time processing pipelines.

name: Drone Mapper
desc: Autonomous drone mapping tool that stitches aerial imagery into geo-referenced orthomosaics using deep-learning-based alignment.

name: Visual SLAM - Lightweight
desc: A lightweight Visual SLAM pipeline for resource-constrained platforms, combining sparse feature tracking with efficient loop closure.

name: Vision
desc: Computer vision research covering object detection, image segmentation, and DINOv2-based fine-tuning for agricultural applications.

name: NLP
desc: Natural language processing experiments including transformer fine-tuning, text classification, and language understanding tasks.

name: Talks
desc: Collection of technical talks and presentations on AI, robotics, and systems engineering topics.

name: Drone Stitching
desc: Docker-containerised image stitching pipeline for drone survey imagery, producing high-resolution composite maps.

name: Personal Tracker
desc: Full-stack habit and goal tracking app with exponential decay progress rings, streak tracking, and a Keep-style journal.

name: Heart Disease Prediction
desc: ML pipeline predicting heart disease using KNN, SVM, decision trees, and random forests on the UCI Heart Disease dataset with a Streamlit web app.
